title: Aterian Quarterly Results - Investor Relations
text: Aterian Quarterly Financial Results Overview. Q3 2025 Results: Net revenue: $19.02M, down 27.5% year-over-year. EPS: -$0.28. Gross margin: 56.1% (decreased from 60.3% in Q3 2024). Cash position: $7.6M (decreased from $18M at end-2024). Q4 2025 Guidance: Q4 2025 guidance of $36-38M in revenue with adjusted EBITDA between break-even and a $1M loss. Management Commentary: CEO Rodriguez identified top-line growth as their biggest challenge. Management plans to resume product launches in the latter half of 2026. Suspended share repurchase program to preserve capital as it navigates tariff impacts, competitive pressures, and market diversification efforts. Historical Quarterly Trend: The company has shown a pattern of revenue volatility throughout 2023-2025, with margins trending upward despite top-line challenges. Gross margins have expanded significantly from the 40-50% range in 2023 to 56-63% by 2024-2025. Adjusted EBITDA has moved from significant losses of $8M+ to near breakeven or small positive territory by late 2024. All quarterly results are accessible through Aterian's investor relations website with full financial statements and earnings call transcripts available.
